name: Geargiagear Gigant XG
name_jp: ギアギアギア <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＸＧ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クロスギガント</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
3 Level 3 monsters
During either player's Battle Step, while an attack involving your Machine-Type monster is occurring: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; negate the effects of all face-up cards your opponent currently controls, also your opponent cannot activate cards or effects. These effects last until the end of the Damage Step. When this face-up card leaves the field: You can target 1 other "Geargia" card in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.
mnst_eff:
3 Level 3 monsters
During either player's Battle Step, while an attack involving your Machine-Type monster is occurring: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; negate the effects of all face-up cards your opponent currently controls, also your opponent cannot activate cards or effects. These effects last until the end of the Damage Step. When this face-up card leaves the field: You can target 1 other "Geargia" card in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.

These effects last until the end of the Damage Step. When this face-up card leaves the field: You can target 1 other "Geargia" card in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.

action: Activates if it leaves the field
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
